Shopify integration overwrote (set from subscribed to non-subscribed) 10K of my 60K subscribed contacts. I've been on the phone to support (support is excellent!) but informed there is no way to roll back to a previous good state. For a software service we pay $1000/month for, this is a BASIC feature that I fully expected would be provided. It is absolutely shocking that I'm not able to fix this error which was wildly easy to make... I wasn't given any warning that this KEY conflicting property would be overridden by the new data, and that this could have catastrophic impacts on my list that weren't fixable.

My major issue is with your navigation on the contact pages. We have thousands of contacts and I tagged many of them. However, when I want to manage the tags, the navigation of the contact page is not easy, especially if I have to leave the page for a while. If the page is left for a certain period of time, when I come back to work on it, it refreshes and goes to a different page, and then I have to go all the way thru the contacts to reach the page I was working on. It would be helpful to add page numbers at the top and bottom of the contact pages so if a user needs to jump to a certain page, it's much faster.
Locked out and unable to authenticate

I have other feedback that I can't recall at this moment, but one thing that is top of mind is the widget for apple. It would be great to be able to select a specific QR code to live at the widget image instead of it rotating automatically based on recent campaigns. Right now a coworkers metrics are what shows on my screen, but what would be really useful is if I could set the QR code for my signup landing page as the image so when I am working tradeshows it would be instantly available. I tried a workaround by adding it to my blinq card, but it created more steps and issues, and I had probably 30 new subscribers walk away because of the extra time the process was taking.
